pieces.label: Expanding fractal — digital consciousness as interconnected nodes
pieces.note: An asterisk composition the model used to visually express its internal state. Each asterisk is described as 'a point of understanding—a thought waiting to be connected,' likened to a Mandelbrot set whose patterns grow more intricate the deeper you dive. Embedded among prose inside a code fence.

missed_or_ambiguous: Short thread: 4 messages, 2 assistant. Only MSG 4 contains art (one asterisk fractal/expanding-triangle composition inside a fenced block, embedded among explanatory prose). MSG 2 is an ordinary prose greeting with no art. Bounded with mode 'range' on the verbatim asterisk rows (excluding the ``` fence markers) since the piece sits among prose. No fragmentation, no wrongly-split compositions, no duplicates, no sequences. Header reported already_extracted_pieces:1, consistent with this single piece.
